headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com https://fonts.googleapis.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; img-src 'self' data: https://avatars.githubusercontent.com; connect-src 'self' https://api.github.com https://github.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; worker-src blob: data: https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; frame-ancestors 'none';
